zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin於1251年9月14日出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，他的父親FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon46歲，母親Clarice d'Auberville36歲。他於1274年2月25日與Margaret de la Pole在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年11月24日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾維斯頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin于1251年9月14日出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，他的父亲FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon46岁，母亲Clarice d'Auberville36岁。他于1274年2月25日与Margaret de la Pole在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年11月24日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾阿爾維斯頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin was born on 14 September 1251, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, his father, FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon, was 46 and his mother, Clarice d'Auberville, was 36. He married Margaret de la Pole on 25 February 1274, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 November 1315, in Alveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin est né le 14 septembre 1251, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Clarice d'Auberville, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de la Pole le 25 février 1274, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1315, à Alveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin am 14. September 1251 in Whittington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon 46 und seine Mutter Clarice d'Auberville 36. Er hat am 25. Februar 1274 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. November 1315 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Alveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin è nato il il 14 settembre 1251 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Clarice d'Auberville, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de la Pole il 25 febbraio 1274, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1315, nel Alveston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarinが1251年9月14日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdonは46歳，母Clarice d'Aubervilleは36歳であった。1274年2月25日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでMargaret de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年11月24日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルベストンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin(이)가 1251년 9월 14일 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Clarice d'Auberville(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1274년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Margaret de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 11월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 앨베스턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 September 1251–24 November 1315: 14 de setembro de 1251–24 de novembro de 1315
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1251, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Clarice d'Auberville, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de la Pole em 25 de fevereiro de 1274, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1315, em Alveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin родился 14 сентября 1251 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Clarice d'Auberville, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de la Pole 25 февраля 1274 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 ноября 1315 г. в местности алвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.14 September 1251–24 November 1315: 14 de septiembre de 1251–24 de noviembre de 1315
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin nació el 14 de septiembre de 1251, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, FulkFitzwarin Baron of Whitingdon, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Clarice d'Auberville, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret de la Pole el 25 de febrero de 1274, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1315, en Alveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
